heading: Short title
label: 4501 Short title
text: This chapter, divided into subchapters, may be cited as “the Defense Production Act of 1950”.
notes: Editorial Notes

References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the Defense Production Act of 1950, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Sept. 8, 1950, ch. 93264 Stat. 798
CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 2061 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
